title: The Codex of Castings
epigraph: Herein are set the words the realm still answers to. Speak them truly, and it will act.

castings.name: report
castings.gloss: Speak a reading and the realm weighs it against what it expects of the trial.

castings.name: log
castings.gloss: Whisper a line into the realm's record. For your eyes alone — never weighed.

castings.name: heal
castings.gloss: Restore a being's vitality. The realm acts, and you see it turn in the scene.

castings.name: deal_damage
castings.gloss: Spend a being's vitality by force. The blow lands in the scene as you cast it.

castings.name: set_stat
castings.gloss: Set one of a being's standings — its strength, its wits — to a number you name.

castings.name: add_item
castings.gloss: Grant an item to the pack. The later zones lean on this.

castings.name: remove_item
castings.gloss: Take an item from the pack, by count.

castings.name: cast_fx
castings.gloss: Loose a visible casting — light, fire, a sign in the air. Shown, never weighed.

colophon: — folio i of the first edition · new leaves appear as the zones wake —
